headline: Intel (INTC) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of computer processor maker Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) jumped 12.1% in the afternoon session after The Information reported that Google placed a firm order for more than 3 million of its tensor processing units to be manufactured by Intel in 2028, while Nvidia is running early trials on Intel's most advanced 18A process for its next-generation Feynman GPU architecture.

content.summary: Shares of computer processor maker Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) jumped 12.1% in the afternoon session after The Information reported that Google placed a firm order for more than 3 million of its tensor processing units to be manufactured by Intel in 2028, while Nvidia is running early trials on Intel's most advanced 18A process for its next-generation Feynman GPU architecture.
